display_text: Ninja Gear, Cost: 0: Non-purchasable item from the void. Casts a single-target Smoke of Deceit effect on yourself, lasting up to 15 seconds. Provides a +15 movement speed bonus while invisible. Excellent for repositioning, initiating ganks, or escaping unnoticed. Stats: CD: 60s, Mana: 100, Duration: 15s.
